[[File:Recurrence Relations.png|thumb|Formulas]]
1st order linear constant coefficient recurrence relation

This is the topic that needs the most work for me
[[Category:Discrete Mathematics]]
[[sn:Recurrence relations]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Recurrence relations]][[sn:Recurrence relations]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
